stemHtml:
You are flying a leg of 750 NM at FL200 with a TAS of 350 kt. You calculated that the aircraft burns 3.5 kg/NAM. Contrary to the forecasts, the wind changed from +5 kt to +10 kt and the OAT is +10°C more than planned. Take into account +0.5% more fuel consumption per 10 degrees warmer air.

How much is the change of fuel used for this leg?
